Metadata.title: Folio — Peer review workspace
Metadata.description: Scholarly manuscript submission, peer review, and publishing workflow

damascus-university-journal-v1.description: Fonts, margins, and reference ordering per Damascus University Journal manuscript guidelines.

Toast.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

ApiErrors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a minute and try again.
ApiErrors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
ApiErrors.forbidden: You do not have permission to do that.
ApiErrors.badRequest: The request could not be processed. Check your input and try again.
ApiErrors.serverError: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again later.
ApiErrors.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
ApiErrors.rateLimitHint: Waiting a short time before retrying usually resolves this.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you requested does not exist or may have been moved.

RouteError.title: Something went wrong
RouteError.description: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page. You can try again or go to a safe page.

Nav.logoutConfirmDescription: You will need to sign in again to access your account.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.loadError: Could not load notifications. Please try again.

submissionDecision.title: Editorial decision
submissionDecision.body: Decision on {submissionTitle}: {decision, select, accepted {accepted} rejected {rejected} revisions_requested {revisions requested} other {{decision}}}.

Home.title: Folio
Home.intro: Authors submit manuscripts, editors assign reviewers, and accepted work appears in the public catalog—one account, role-based dashboards, editorial workflow.
Home.featureSubmitBody: Manuscripts and revisions in one queue with clear status at every step.
Home.featureReviewBody: Invites, assignments, and decisions—without losing context in email threads.
Home.featurePublicBody: Accepted work is discoverable with abstracts, authors, and stable links.
Home.heroAsideTitle: One workspace for authors, editors, and reviewers.
Home.heroAsideBody: Structured queues, role-based access, and a public face for accepted scholarship.

Login.sideBlurb: Scholarly publishing workflow in one place—roles, assignments, and the public record.
Login.title: Log in

Register.sideBlurb: Scholarly publishing workflow in one place—roles, assignments, and the public record.
Register.title: Register
Register.hint: You get one account. Everyone can submit as an author; editor and reviewer capabilities are granted by the journal. If you opt in as a willing reviewer, editors may invite you to assignments—manuscripts are not self-selected from a public list.
Register.emailInstitutionalHint: An institutional email helps editors verify your affiliation (recommended, not required).
Register.reviewKeywordsPlaceholder: Type a topic, then press Enter, comma, or Tab…
Register.willingToReview: I am willing to be considered as a peer reviewer for this journal (editors assign manuscripts; you do not pick papers yourself).

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.pendingInvitationsHint: Accept or decline here. Nothing is finalized until you respond.
Dashboard.roleInviteEditorLine: {name} invited you to become an editor
Dashboard.roleInviteJournalManagerLine: {name} invited you to become a journal manager
Dashboard.emailLanguageHint: Transactional emails (e.g. review invitations) use this when set; otherwise the editor’s UI language or site default applies.
Dashboard.emailLanguageSaveFailed: Could not save your email language preference.

Submissions.title: Submissions
Submissions.hint: Authors see their own work. Editors see the incoming queue (no drafts).
Submissions.emptyHint: When you create a submission, it will appear here.

SubmissionsNew.title: New submission
SubmissionsNew.titleNotUnique: This title is already in use—please choose another.
SubmissionsNew.draftStatusBeforeSave: Not saved yet — save below to create your draft.
SubmissionsNew.manuscriptAttachHint: Choose files below; they are sent to the server when you click “Save draft” with your metadata.
SubmissionsNew.presentationBeforeSaveHint: These choices are kept when you save the draft. On the submission page you can change them again before “Submit for review”.
SubmissionsNew.validationKeywordsEnRange: English keywords must be between 3 and 6
SubmissionsNew.validationKeywordsArRange: Arabic keywords must be between 3 and 6 since an Arabic title was provided
SubmissionsNew.validationAuthorsRequired: At least one author must be added
SubmissionsNew.validationAuthorFullNameRequired: Full name for Author {index} is required
SubmissionsNew.validationCorrespondingAuthorRequired: Exactly one corresponding author must be selected
SubmissionsNew.validationOriginalityRequired: Please confirm work originality to proceed
SubmissionsNew.validationCoverLetterRequired: Please stage the required Cover Letter
SubmissionsNew.validationTitlePageRequired: Please stage the required Title Page
SubmissionsNew.validationManuscriptRequired: Please stage the required Main Manuscript file

SubmissionDetail.uploadSubtitle: Add your manuscript files here. You can download or remove them before you submit.
SubmissionDetail.removeFileConfirm: Remove this file from the submission?
SubmissionDetail.uploadHint: Required: cover letter, title page, and main manuscript. Optional: figures, tables, supplementary files. The system checks this package when you submit.
SubmissionDetail.submitIrreversibleHint: Once you submit, you cannot take this back yourself.
SubmissionDetail.noReviewersAvailable: No reviewers available to assign — they may already be assigned on this manuscript, or no users with the reviewer role have opted in as willing to review.
SubmissionDetail.reviewPackageIncomplete: Add at least one manuscript file to the review package before starting peer review.
SubmissionDetail.editorPanelHint: Assign reviewers and move this submission through the workflow.
SubmissionDetail.corpusSimilarityDisclaimer: Advisory check against this journal's published corpus only. High overlap is not proof of misconduct. Indexed articles may use title and abstract only, so matches can differ from the full manuscript.
SubmissionDetail.corpusSimilarityUnavailable: Corpus similarity is not available (AI service off or not configured).
SubmissionDetail.corpusSimilarityNoText: Not enough manuscript text to run a similarity check.
SubmissionDetail.corpusSimilarityClear: No substantial overlap with published articles above the threshold.
SubmissionDetail.editorAssignColumnHint: Choose a reviewer for this manuscript.
SubmissionDetail.suggestReviewersHint: Ranks willing reviewers by fit to this manuscript's abstract and keywords. Advisory only.
SubmissionDetail.suggestReviewersUnavailable: Reviewer suggestions are not available (AI matching off or not configured).
SubmissionDetail.suggestReviewersNoText: Add abstract or keywords before requesting suggestions.
SubmissionDetail.suggestReviewersEmpty: No matching reviewers found in the candidate pool.
SubmissionDetail.reviewerAssignClosedHint: Reviewer assignment is only available while the submission is submitted or under review.
SubmissionDetail.editorWorkflowColumnHint: Update the submission status when the workflow advances.
SubmissionDetail.constructorModeNotice: The main manuscript is built in the Word Constructor. Open it to edit sections; use “Submit for review” below when the full package is ready.
SubmissionDetail.constructorCompanionFilesHint: Optional: cover letter or title page PDFs if your journal requires them separately. The main manuscript Word file is generated from the constructor when you submit.
SubmissionDetail.constructorUploadHint: Optional: cover letter, title page, figures, tables, supplementary files. Submit for review generates the main manuscript from the constructor.
SubmissionDetail.chooseManuscriptMode: How will you provide the manuscript?
SubmissionDetail.chooseManuscriptModeHint: Upload a finished .docx, or build it section by section in the constructor.
SubmissionDetail.reviewMethodHint: Open: identities visible. Single-blind (anonymous): reviewer hidden from author. Double-anonymous: both sides anonymized for reviewers.
SubmissionDetail.attachedFilesPublishedHint: This article is published. Files are read-only; use download to access them.
SubmissionDetail.doubleBlindAuthorNotice: This submission uses double-anonymous review. The editor will share a curated, anonymized file set with reviewers; your full submission package stays with the editorial office.
SubmissionDetail.reviewPackageEditorHint: Reviewers only download files marked “Review package”. Move at least one manuscript here before moving to “Under review” or before a reviewer accepts.
SubmissionDetail.emailRemindersHint: Only pending reminders can be rescheduled or cancelled. New send time must be more than 2 minutes from now (UTC).
SubmissionDetail.reviewerAssignAdditionalHint: Reviewers with a pending or active assignment on this manuscript are hidden here. Open the list to assign someone else.
SubmissionDetail.reminderRescheduleRequired: Choose a new send time first.
SubmissionDetail.reminderSendAtTooSoon: Send time must be more than 2 minutes from now.
SubmissionDetail.reminderNoSlug: Assignment has no slug — reminders unavailable.
SubmissionDetail.reminderNoneForAssignment: No pending reminders for this assignment.
SubmissionDetail.reminderNoneScheduled: No scheduled reminders yet. They are created when the reviewer invitation is processed by the email service (RabbitMQ + email-service running).

SubmissionWorkflow.metadataReadonlyHint: Information supplied by the author (as in editorial-manager systems).
SubmissionWorkflow.metadataEditHint: Complete metadata, authorship, declarations, and reviewer preferences before uploading files and submitting.
SubmissionWorkflow.sectionMetadataHint: Used for invitations and indexing. English title drives the URL slug. Arabic title, both abstracts (max 300 words each), and keywords in English and Arabic (3–6 per language at submit) should match the manuscript.
SubmissionWorkflow.keywordsPlaceholder: Type a keyword, then press Enter, comma, or Tab…
SubmissionWorkflow.keywordsPlaceholderAr: اكتب كلمة مفتاحية ثم Enter أو فاصلة أو Tab…
SubmissionWorkflow.keywordsCount: {count} of 6 keywords (submission requires 3–6). Duplicates are ignored.
SubmissionWorkflow.keywordSuggestHint: AI suggests indexing-style terms from your title and abstract in each language you provide. Review and edit before saving; submission still requires 3–6 keywords in both English and Arabic.
SubmissionWorkflow.keywordSuggestDisabledHint: Add English or Arabic title and abstract first.
SubmissionWorkflow.keywordSuggestResultsHint: Suggested terms — add individually or all at once:
SubmissionWorkflow.keywordSuggestSuccess: Keyword suggestions ready — add the terms you want below.
SubmissionWorkflow.keywordSuggestNotConfigured: AI keyword suggestions are not enabled on this server.
SubmissionWorkflow.keywordSuggestMax: You already have 6 keywords (the maximum). Remove one to add another.
SubmissionWorkflow.keywordSuggestDuplicate: That keyword is already in your list.
SubmissionWorkflow.keywordSuggestTooLong: That keyword is too long to add.
SubmissionWorkflow.keywordSuggestAddAllNone: No new keywords could be added — the list is full or every suggestion is already present.
SubmissionWorkflow.sectionAuthorsHint: List every author as they should appear if published. Mark exactly one corresponding author.
SubmissionWorkflow.fundingPlaceholder: Grant numbers, sponsors, or “No external funding.”
SubmissionWorkflow.coiPlaceholder: e.g. “None declared” or disclose relevant interests
SubmissionWorkflow.ethicalPlaceholder: Committee name and reference, or “N/A” if not applicable
SubmissionWorkflow.aiPlaceholder: State if tools were used in writing or analysis, or “Not used.”
SubmissionWorkflow.originalityConfirm: I confirm this work is original, not published elsewhere, and is not under consideration at another journal.
SubmissionWorkflow.sectionReviewersHint: Editors are not bound by suggestions; avoid colleagues at your own institution for suggested reviewers.
SubmissionWorkflow.draftCreated: Draft saved — continue on the submission page.
SubmissionWorkflow.disciplineAuthorHint: AI suggests a discipline from your Arabic title, keywords, and abstract. You confirm the final field before submit.
SubmissionWorkflow.disciplineEditorHint: AI suggestion and the author-confirmed field are shown for desk triage. Only the author can edit article metadata or confirm the discipline.
SubmissionWorkflow.disciplineEditorEmpty: No AI discipline suggestion yet. The author can request one when editing the submission.
SubmissionWorkflow.disciplineScopeWarning: This suggestion may be outside the journal’s scope — review before accepting or rejecting.
SubmissionWorkflow.disciplineSuggestSuccess: AI suggestion ready — review and confirm below.
SubmissionWorkflow.disciplineSuggestFailed: Could not get an AI suggestion.
SubmissionWorkflow.disciplineSuggestNotConfigured: AI discipline suggestions are not enabled on this server.
SubmissionWorkflow.disciplineSaveFailed: Could not save the academic field.
SubmissionWorkflow.fileKindHint_cover_letter: Brief note to the editor on fit and contribution.
SubmissionWorkflow.fileKindHint_title_page: Title, all author names, affiliations, and corresponding author contact.
SubmissionWorkflow.fileKindHint_manuscript: Full text. For double-blind journals, omit identifying information from this file.
SubmissionWorkflow.fileKindHint_figure: TIFF, EPS, or PDF as per journal policy (sample accepts common formats).
SubmissionWorkflow.fileKindHint_table: Separate table files if not embedded in the main manuscript.

Editor.title: Editor queue
Editor.hint: Filter by status (editors only; authors see their own list on Submissions).

EmailSettings.title: Email templates & reminders
EmailSettings.hint: Journal managers only. Edit reviewer, reminder, and copyediting transactional emails. Reminder offsets are from invitation time: first at (N−3) days, second at (N+1) days, where N is the value below. Changing policy does not reschedule existing pending reminders.
EmailSettings.forbidden: You do not have access to this page.
EmailSettings.reviewDueDaysHelp: Must be at least 4. Used to schedule due-soon and overdue reminder emails for new assignments.
EmailSettings.subject: Subject (Handlebars)
EmailSettings.variablesReminder: Variables (Handlebars): reviewerDisplayName, submissionTitle, assignmentUrl, dueAt; conditional helpers include isOverdue
EmailSettings.variablesCopyeditQueriesSent: Variables (Handlebars): authorDisplayName, copyeditorDisplayName, submissionTitle, round, noteExcerpt, submissionUrl
EmailSettings.variablesCopyeditAuthorReady: Variables (Handlebars): copyeditorDisplayName, authorDisplayName, submissionTitle, round, workbenchUrl
EmailSettings.variablesSubmissionSubmitted: Variables (Handlebars): editorDisplayName, authorDisplayName, submissionTitle, isResubmission, editorQueueUrl
EmailSettings.variablesSubmissionDecision: Variables (Handlebars): authorDisplayName, submissionTitle, submissionUrl, decidedByDisplayName; branch flags isAccepted, isRejected, isRevisionsRequested
EmailSettings.conflict: Settings were changed elsewhere. Refresh the page and try again.
EmailSettings.pipelineHint: Operational snapshot: API outbox, email-service send log, scheduled reminders, and RabbitMQ queue depths (cached). High “pending” reminders are normal before send time.
EmailSettings.requeueOutboxOk: Outbox row requeued; drainer will retry shortly
EmailSettings.dlqHint: After fixing the broker or handler, replay failed messages back onto the main exchange. Start with one message; increase the limit only when you are sure the root cause is fixed.
EmailSettings.replayDlqPartial: Replayed {ok} of {total}; see pipeline refresh for queue depth
EmailSettings.replayDlqEmpty: DLQ is empty — nothing to replay
EmailSettings.timelineHint: Visual timeline mapping of reminders scheduled relative to the Day {n} review due date.
EmailSettings.timelineStepInvitedDesc: Email sent requesting review. Reminders pre-scheduled.
EmailSettings.timelineStepDueSoonDesc: First notification sent warning of upcoming due date.
EmailSettings.timelineStepDueDesc: Deadline day. Submissions closed unless editor overrides.
EmailSettings.timelineStepOverdueDesc: Second reminder dispatched prompting immediate response.

Assignments.title: My review assignments
Assignments.hint: Editors invite you before a review counts as active. Accept an invitation to access files and submit your report.
Assignments.emptyHint: When an editor invites you to review a paper, it will appear here.
Assignments.needReviewerRole: You need the reviewer role for this page.

AssignmentsInvite.title: Peer review invitation
AssignmentsInvite.hint: The editor has asked you to review this submission. Accept to access the full manuscript and files, or decline if you cannot.
AssignmentsInvite.fullManuscriptAfterAccept: After you accept, you can open the full manuscript and supporting files from the review page.
AssignmentsInvite.notInvited: This assignment is not awaiting a response.

AssignmentsReview.title: Submit review
AssignmentsReview.commentsHint: Summarize strengths and weaknesses for the author and editor. Be specific and constructive.
AssignmentsReview.commentsForAuthorHint: The author can see this text. Optional if you provide confidential editor comments below.
AssignmentsReview.commentsToEditorOnlyHint: Only editors see this. Optional if you provide author comments above — at least one of the two is required.
AssignmentsReview.recHintAccept: Ready for acceptance or only minor edits.
AssignmentsReview.recHintReject: Does not meet the bar for publication here.
AssignmentsReview.recHintRevisions: Promising work that needs substantive changes before acceptance.
AssignmentsReview.commentsForAuthorRequired: Please enter comments for the author.
AssignmentsReview.notFound: This review assignment was not found or you no longer have access.
AssignmentsReview.notPending: This assignment is no longer open for review. You may have already submitted, or it was withdrawn.
AssignmentsReview.acceptInvitationFirst: You need to accept the invitation before you can access the full manuscript and submit a review.

Publications.title: Publications
Publications.hint: Peer-reviewed work in this journal — browse without signing in.
Publications.searchPlaceholderSemantic: Describe a topic — semantic search by meaning…
Publications.advancedAuthorHint: Narrows results by author. Type at least two characters for suggestions from published works.
Publications.resultCount: {count, plural, =0 {No results} one {# result} other {# results}}

ConstructorMode.heading: How would you like to provide your manuscript?
ConstructorMode.subheading: You can change your mind later, but switching modes after you start may delete content from the other mode.
ConstructorMode.uploadDescription: Use this if you already have a Word document prepared. We will not modify the file.
ConstructorMode.constructorDescription: Build your article section by section. The system generates a journal-styled .docx for you.

ConstructorManuscript.pendingHint: The main manuscript will be generated from the constructor when you submit for review, or you can attach a .docx from the constructor page.
ConstructorManuscript.attachedHint: A .docx generated from the constructor is attached as your main manuscript.
ConstructorManuscript.removeConstructorDescription: This clears your constructor draft on the server. You can start again in the constructor or switch to uploading a finished .docx.
ConstructorManuscript.switchToConstructorDescription: Your uploaded main manuscript file will be removed. You cannot undo this without re-uploading or re-importing from Word.
ConstructorManuscript.switchToConstructorFailed: Could not switch to Word Constructor
ConstructorManuscript.dualPathHint: You can upload a finished main manuscript and/or build one in the Word Constructor. Nothing is removed when you use the other option.
ConstructorManuscript.clearConstructorDescription: This removes only the saved constructor sections on the server. Uploaded files are not affected.
ConstructorManuscript.submitSourceHint: You have both an uploaded file and a constructor draft. Choose which one to use when you submit for review.
ConstructorManuscript.presentationHint: Choose which main manuscript version(s) to include in the review package when you submit. You can select one or both.
ConstructorManuscript.presentationConstructor: Show Word Constructor version (generates .docx on submit)
ConstructorManuscript.presentationAtLeastOne: Select at least one version to present for review.

ConstructorPage.subtitleNew: Build the article in sections here. Your word construction is saved in this browser until you continue to create the submission.
ConstructorPage.subtitleEdit: Changes save automatically. Download or attach a styled Word file, then submit for review from the submission page.
ConstructorPage.attachManuscriptSuccess: Manuscript file saved on the server.
ConstructorPage.attachManuscriptFailed: Could not attach the manuscript file.
ConstructorPage.importWordSuccess: Word document imported into the constructor. Review each section before continuing.
ConstructorPage.importWordFailed: Could not import this Word file.
ConstructorPage.importWordNoContent: No recognizable content was found in this Word file. Try a simpler document or build sections manually. Files exported from this constructor usually cannot be re-imported.
ConstructorPage.importWordReplaceDescription: The file will be parsed into constructor sections. Empty title and abstract fields will be filled from the document; existing body paragraphs and headings will be replaced. Pinned sections remain, but review all content after import.
ConstructorPage.browserDraftNotice: Edits are saved automatically in this browser. They are not sent to the server until you create a submission from the next step.
ConstructorPage.attachConstructorFailed: Your submission was created, but attaching the Word constructor draft failed. You can open the constructor from the submission page to try again.
ConstructorPage.missingTitleForSave: Add a title section before saving the draft — the submission record needs at least a title.
ConstructorPage.missingAbstractForSave: Add an abstract section before saving the draft.
ConstructorPage.saveFailed: Could not save your draft. Please try again.
ConstructorPage.autosaveFailed: Auto-save failed. Your changes are kept in the editor — try editing again to retry.
ConstructorPage.submitBlockedByValidation: Please address the issues highlighted above before submitting.
ConstructorPage.readOnlyNotOwner: You can view this constructor draft, but only the author can edit it.
ConstructorPage.readOnlyStatus: This submission is in “{status}” status — editing is disabled.
ConstructorPage.uploadModeWarning: This submission currently uses the upload flow. Adding constructor content here will switch it to constructor mode on save.
ConstructorPage.quotaExceeded: Your browser ran out of storage for the local draft. Continue to create your submission soon to avoid losing changes.
ConstructorPage.externalUpdate: Picked up a newer draft from another tab.
ConstructorPage.importWarning_CONSTRUCTOR_IMPORT_TABLE_N: A paragraph after a table may be a table note — please verify it is attached to the correct table.
ConstructorPage.importWarning_CONSTRUCTOR_IMPORT_BACK_MA: A back-matter heading was detected but no following text was imported — add the section manually if needed.
ConstructorPage.importWarning_CONSTRUCTOR_IMPORT_EQUATIO: Equations in Word files are not imported; re-enter them using equation sections.
ConstructorPage.importWarning_CONSTRUCTOR_IMPORT_MAMMOTH: Word reported formatting notes during import — review sections below for anything missing.

ConstructorWorkspace.styleUnsavedHint: unsaved — download uses your latest edits
ConstructorWorkspace.styleCatalogError: Could not load manuscript styles. Try refreshing the page.
ConstructorWorkspace.stylePinnedSectionsAdded: This style added required sections to your document.

ConstructorList.wordCountTitle: Soft limit: {limit} weighted words (≈25 pages, journal cap)
ConstructorList.recommendedPresetsTitle: Recommended sections for this journal style
ConstructorList.referencesOrderSoft: References usually appear last; content after your references list may look unusual in the exported Word file.

ConstructorEditor.titleHint: Article title as it should appear at the top of the manuscript.
ConstructorEditor.abstractHint: Maximum 300 words. Keywords use the same tag entry as the submission checklist (Enter, comma, or Tab).
ConstructorEditor.paragraphHint: Body paragraph. Bold, italic, underline, superscript, subscript, links, and lists are supported.
ConstructorEditor.toolbarLinkPrompt: Enter URL (https://, http://, or mailto:). Leave empty to remove the link.
ConstructorEditor.imageHint: Upload an image and provide a caption — figures are numbered automatically in order of appearance.
ConstructorEditor.imageNeedsDraft: Save the draft first to upload images.
ConstructorEditor.tableHint: Add a caption above the table. Tables are numbered automatically.
ConstructorEditor.tableHasHeader: First row is a header row
ConstructorEditor.tableNoMergedCells: Merged cells are not supported in this version.
ConstructorEditor.tableNotesPlaceholder: Optional note below the table (plain text)…
ConstructorEditor.richText_dataAvailability_hint: Where data or code can be accessed.
ConstructorEditor.equationHint: LaTeX syntax. Equations export as images in Word (not editable formulas).
ConstructorEditor.referencesHint: Arabic references will be listed first, then English, sorted alphabetically within each group. Use italic for book and journal titles (journal style).
ConstructorEditor.dirToggleHint: Click to override the direction for this section.

ConstructorPreview.ariaLabel: Live preview of the generated Word document
ConstructorPreview.empty: Add sections on the left to see the preview here.
ConstructorPreview.approximateNotice: Approximate layout only — generate .docx for final formatting.

ConstructorValidation.checklistTitle: Before you submit, address these items:
ConstructorValidation.blockedTitle: Submission was blocked. Fix the items below and try again.
ConstructorValidation.error_CONSTRUCTOR_TITLE_DUPLICATE: Only one title section is allowed.
ConstructorValidation.error_CONSTRUCTOR_TITLE_EMPTY: The English title cannot be empty.
ConstructorValidation.error_CONSTRUCTOR_TITLE_AR_EMPTY: The Arabic title cannot be empty.
ConstructorValidation.error_CONSTRUCTOR_AUTHORS_DUPLICATE: Only one authors section is allowed.
ConstructorValidation.error_CONSTRUCTOR_ACKNOWLEDGMENTS_DUPLIC: Only one acknowledgments section is allowed.
ConstructorValidation.error_CONSTRUCTOR_FUNDING_DUPLICATE: Only one funding section is allowed.
ConstructorValidation.error_CONSTRUCTOR_CONFLICT_OF_INTEREST_D: Only one conflict of interest section is allowed.
ConstructorValidation.error_CONSTRUCTOR_DATA_AVAILABILITY_DUPL: Only one data availability section is allowed.
ConstructorValidation.error_CONSTRUCTOR_ACKNOWLEDGMENTS_EMPTY: Acknowledgments cannot be empty for this style.
ConstructorValidation.error_CONSTRUCTOR_FUNDING_EMPTY: Funding statement cannot be empty for this style.
ConstructorValidation.error_CONSTRUCTOR_CONFLICT_OF_INTEREST_E: Conflict of interest statement cannot be empty for this style.
ConstructorValidation.error_CONSTRUCTOR_DATA_AVAILABILITY_EMPT: Data availability statement cannot be empty for this style.

Copyedit.title: Copyediting
Copyedit.queueHint: Manuscripts assigned to you for production copyediting.
Copyedit.needCopyeditorRole: You need the copyeditor role to view this page.
Copyedit.markedReady: Marked as ready for copyeditor review.
Copyedit.readyFailed: Could not mark ready. Upload a revised manuscript after the latest request.
Copyedit.uploadRevisionHint: Upload a new manuscript file after addressing each round of requests.

Validation.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {maxMb} MB.
Validation.abstractMaxWordsEn: English abstract must be at most {max} words.
Validation.abstractMaxWordsAr: Arabic abstract must be at most {max} words.
Validation.reviewCommentsRequired: Enter comments for the author and/or confidential comments for the editor (at least one).
